characters.name: Abby
characters.description: AbbyBiographyGenderFemaleFriendsSam GardnerCasey GardnerAbbyis a reoccurring character inSeason 3ofAtypical. She is also the classmate ofSam Gardnerin art class at Denton University. Abby is portrayed by actress Kimia Behpoornia. In the episode "Y.G.A.G.G." of the third Season, Abby is first introduced in art class, where she kindly compliments Sam's amazing artistic drawing, despite being falsely accused by Sam of stealing his pencil when he lost his pencil. She invites him and his best friend,Zahid, to her art jam party to meet other people who are dedicated to art as well. At the art jam party, Abby welcomes Sam and Zahid, as she lets them roam around to watch other people draw. When Zahid smokes in her party, Abby tells him to smoke outside, since there is a rule that anyone can't lit a cigar in here. Therefore, Zahid leaves the party to smoke near a dumpster to meetGretchen.

characters.name: Amber
characters.description: AmberBiographyGenderFemaleRelativesMegan(mother)Unnamed FatherFriendsSam GardnerJasperNoelleLilySabrinaAmberis a minor character inSeason 2ofAtypical. She’s a teenage girl in the autism peer group, along withSam Gardner. She’s the only daughter ofMegan. Amber is portrayed by autistic actress Layla Weiner. In the episode "Little Dude and the Lion" of the second Season, Amber is first seen with the guidance counselor or the leader of the peer group,Ms. Whitaker. She’s also seen with Sam Gardner and other autistic teenagers, such especiallyJasper,Noelle,LilyandSabrina, in the autism peer group meeting. When Sam talks about attending college, she statistically talks about how there is about a 20% or lower chance of autistic students graduating from college, and how most of them are not able to succeed with their college career. After the meeting is over, Sam accidentally left his college portfolio in the room, giving Amber an opportunity to snatch it from him to prevent him from getting accepted into Denton University. In the episode "Living at an Angle", unfortunately for Amber, Amber either confesses to her mother about violating Sam's personal property (due to her high empathy, brutal honesty and autism) or her mother eventually finds out about it. They both travel to the Gardner's house, where Amber returns the portfolio to Sam, because she was worried about him not being able to handle college. Her mother tells her to apologize to Sam and his parents about the situation. She complies with her mother, and they both leave the Gardner's home immediately. Although, she isn't punished for her actions against Sam by her mother, due to Amber's high empathy, brutal honesty and autism.

characters.name: April Turner
characters.description: April TurnerBiographyGenderFemaleAprilis a recurring minor character inSeason 1ofAtypical. She is the mother of JJ, who is on Newton High School's track team thatCaseyis a part of. April is portrayed by actress Nakia Burrise. In the episode "The D-Train to Bone Town", April seems to harbor a huge dislike forElsaduring a PTA meeting.Paigeoffers the idea of a silent dance with headphones in order to haveSamattend, and not be overwhelmed by loud music. April refuses, stating they don't need to change everything to "accommodate one kid". However, most of the other PTA members support Paige's idea and the motion is passed, to which April angrily tells Elsa that "the world doesn't revolve around you".

characters.name: Arlo
characters.description: ArloBiographyGenderMaleRelativesHolly(mother)Theo(father)RomancesBailey Bennett (ex-fling)FriendsHenryBailey Bennett(formerly)Sam Gardner(during childhood; formerly)Arlois a guest character introduced inSeason 1ofAtypical. He is described as the spoiled, popular kid who enjoys bullying social outcasts, specificallySam Gardner. Arlo is portrayed by actor Major Curda. In the episode "A Human Female" of thefirst Season, Arlo makes his first debut, along with the other popular kids or his followers, includingBailey Bennett, who flirts with Arlo by kissing him, at Newton High School. WhenSamapproaches Bailey and Arlo to ask them on how to steal a girlfriend and he calls her a "skank" for kissing Henry and then Arlo, Arlo is offended and annoyed by Sam. He and his followers intimidate Sam by insulting him that he will never get laid by girls, but once Sam's anxiety starts to rise and while Bailey, in pity of Sam, tells Arlo and his followers to stop messing with him, Sam runs away from them. Later on, in the episode "The Egg Is Pipping" ofSeason 2, he approaches Sam again at school near his locker by politely inviting him to his party at his house. However, since Sam told hismotherthat he was invited to Arlo's party and Arlo manipulated him to gain about $700 of funding to his party, Elsa calls Arlo's parents on her phone to ask what cutlery Sam would bring, based on advice given to him by Arlo. This is revealed to Arlo's parents that he was planning a party while they were going to be out of town that weekend. Arlo gets angry at him and grabs his expensive phone to smash it by tossing it to the ground, after Sam was watching a video of a baby penguin egg preparing to hatch on his phone. On top of that, Arlo pushes Sam to the ground to dehumanize him even further, causing Sam to feel sad about it and he leaves the scene in pain, while every students around them didn't do anything to stand up against Arlo or report to authorities about the incident. Otherwise speaking, the students around Arlo enable him out of fear of being targeted by him next right after Sam.

characters.name: Bailey Bennett
characters.description: Bailey BennettBiographyGenderFemaleRomancesSam Gardner (ex-fling)Arlo (ex-fling)Henry (ex-fling)FriendsArlo(Formerly)Sam GardnerBailey Bennettis a recurring character introduced inSeason 1ofAtypical. She is described as the mean girl who enjoys bullying girls, specificallyBeth Chapin. Bailey is portrayed by actress Ariela Barer. Bailey is one of the students who attends Newton High School. First shown in the episode "Antarctica" ofSeason 1, she is laughing at Beth's vandalized locker. WhenCasey Gardnerrealizes that this was Bailey's doing, she punches her in the face, resulting in a blackeye on Bailey's face and Casey's suspension. In the episode "A Human Female", Bailey's family is revealed to be one of the biggest in terms of funding school activities. This includes a bus that the Track Team used for a ride to a competition, forcing Casey to begrudgingly apologize to her, so that her father will fund their bus this year.

characters.name: Beth Chapin
characters.description: Beth ChapinBiographyGenderFemaleRelativesEvan Chapin(brother)Duane Chapin(father)Josie(stepmother)Unnamed MotherFriendsCasey GardnerIzzie Taylor(acquaintance)ShariceSam Gardner(acquaintance)Beth Chapinis a character introduced inSeason 1ofAtypical. She gets bullied byBailey BennettbeforeCaseysteps in to defend her. Beth is portrayed by actress and singerRachel Redleaf. In the episode "Antarctica" of the first Season, Beth is first introduced being bullied by Bailey after the word 'ORCA' is written on her locker with students surrounding them, laughing at her and taking pictures of her locker. Casey steps in and defends her by punching Bailey Bennett in the face, earning Beth's respect of her at the cost Casey being suspended from school. On that same day, she goes to Casey's house with her brother,Evan, with a cake to thank her for what she did. She stays friends with Casey as she is trusted enough to hold onto Sam's lunch money when Casey isn't in school one day due to her interview at Clayton Prep.

characters.name: Bob
characters.description: BobBiographyGenderMaleFriendsSam Gardner(Former employee)Zahid(Former employee)Bobis a recurring character inSeason 1ofAtypical. He was the boss ofSam GardnerandZahidatTechtropolis. Bob is portrayed by actor Jeffrey Rosenthal. Throughout from the Season 1 toSeason 4, Bob is very generous to both, Sam and Zahid, and he is proud of their great work at managing customers. Despite that, he isn't a passive pushover or a "yes man" when it comes to not being above enabling his workers to get away with breaking his rules. Outside of Techtropolis, in the episode "Pants on Fire", he catches Zahid smoking marijuana, so he gives him a warning to not do it again next time. In the episode "Shrinkage" of thethird Season, after he returned from his vacation to Jamaica, Bob is informed by Sam that he discovers, through a security footage, thatGretchenstole a turquoise fitbit from the store. However, acting as the substitute top manager, Zahid refuses to acknowledge it as a theft. Instead, he marks it down as a shrinkage. Enraged, Bob bans Gretchen from the store, and he gives Zahid one more chance to redeem himself. Otherwise, Zahid is fired from his job forever. Regardless, Bob is still a reasonable man who makes an exception to his rule for his workers. In the episode "Sam Takes a Walk", Bob allows Sam (who burned Zahid's favorite shirt accidentally) off the hook for the Techtropolis fire, because he realized that it is highly unusual for a display model stove to be hooked up, unless someone was actually living there. A meaner boss would have taken it out on Sam and even fired him easily, on the other hand.

characters.name: Bree
characters.description: BreeBiographyGenderFemaleRomancesSam Gardner(Former dating partner)Breeis a minor character who is introduced inSeason 1ofAtypical. She wasSam Gardner's first date. She is portrayed by actress Gabriela Flores. In the episode "Antarctica", Sam signs up for online dating. Bree is interested in going on a date with him. She has a cat named "Simba". At a diner with Sam, Bree is asking him about his headphones, and he explains that it is his noise-cancelling headphones. He then starts giving inappropriate comments about her, based on what he had learned from his peers and the internet. Sam also asks her if he can get rid of her cat, causing the date to officially end between them.

characters.name: Casey Gardner
characters.description: Casey GardnerBiographyAliasesNewton(byIzzie)Case(byElsaandDoug)Rat(byIzzie)BirthdayMay 15, 2002StatusAliveGenderFemaleRelativesElsa Gardner(mother)Doug Gardner(father)Sam Gardner(older brother)Lillian(maternal grandmother)RomancesIzzie Taylor(girlfriend)Evan Chapin(ex-boyfriend)FriendsIzzie Taylor(girlfriend)Sharice(best friend)Evan ChapinBeth Chapin(acquaintance)Nate(formerly)AbbyTanya (Newton High School)Quinn (Newton High School)Penelope (Newton High School)OccupationHigh school StudentResidenceConnecticutSeries InformationSeasons1•2•3•4First Appearance1.01:"Antarctica"Last Appearance4.10:"Dessert at Olive Garden"Portrayed byJack HavenCasey Gardnerthe deuteragonist of theNetflixcomedy drama seriesAtypical. She is a star track athlete at Newton High School and later Clayton Prep. She is the daughter ofDoug GardnerandElsa Gardnerand the younger sister ofSam Gardner. Casey is portrayed by actorJack Haven. Casey is a feisty, strong-willed, protective, brave young girl, as well as kind, caring, independent, reasonable and clever. She often teases or picks on herbrotherin a sisterly way, but she always protects him due to him being autistic. She often makes fun ofElsaand always have snarky comments and shows her bad attitude towards her mother. Casey has respect forDoug, even though he left her and Sam when Doug learned that Sam is autistic. She’s confident and isn’t afraid to stand up for herself. Especially when she ‘BOPS’Nate’s milkshake at him for insulting her. Casey is often shown annoying her brother, doing things, such as taking his food or crawling over him. This is her way of helping him and trying to prepare him, knowing that he will have to encounter people who annoy him. Casey is shown affection to Sam when he needs her the most. She is very reliable to Sam, and she is always there for him whenever he needs it no matter what. In thefirst Season, Casey has been shown to be rather protective of her brother,Sam, and others as well. Casey did not receive much attention growing up, despite being the younger child, asElsaandDougwere often attending to Sam's needs. In 2004, following Sam's diagnosis at age 4, their father was distressed and believing he was not fit to care for a child with autism, so he left the family for 8 months to live at his dad's house. Casey was too young to remember, and she simply carried on with her mother and brother. characters.name: Christopher
characters.description: ChristopherBiographyGenderMaleFriendsSam GardnerChristopheris a minor character and a teenager inSeason 1ofAtypical. He is the son ofLuisa. Christopher is portrayed by guest actor Anthony Jacques. In the episode "The D-Train to Bone Town" of the first Season, Christopher is first seen inside of his house being called by his mother, Luisa, to meetSam, whileSam's motheris busy with trimming Luisa's hair. At Sam's house and in his bedroom, he tries to find common interests with Sam to become friends with him. On the other hand, Sam doesn't have interests into becoming his friend, until he comes up with the idea on how to get a girlfriend to like him and have sexual intercourse with him. This sparks Christopher's curiosity of providing dating tips to Sam, who jots down plenty of tips on his notebook. As a result, he earns his companionship with Sam. In the episode "The Silencing Properties of Snow", Christopher is invited to the autism-friendly dance with his mother byPaige Hardaway. He meets Sam and his parents, and he hears from Sam that he received a handjob from Paige inside of an igloo. He is surprised and happy to hear good news from Sam. During the dance, he shows hisHell Demoncomic book to his mother.

characters.name: Chuck
characters.description: ChuckBiographyGenderMaleFriendsDoug Gardner(Best friend)Evan Chapin(Co-worker)OccupationEMT (formerly)Chuckwas a minor character and a middle-aged adult inAtypical. He was the closest friend ofDoug Gardnerat the EMT workplace as a paramedic. Chuck is portrayed by actor Karl T. Wright. In thefirst Season, Chuck is first seen with Doug near their ambulance vehicle. Frequently, Chuck talks about his retirement plans to Doug coming up throughout each Seasons. In other words, Chuck is getting sick of working at EMT, since he is getting old. In thefinal Season, Doug gets a phone call in his house kitchen that Chuck had passed away from a heart attack. Chuck died on his retirement day. Shortly after passing Doug finds Chuck’s 13 year old sourdough starter in the work fridge and brings it home to keep in his fridge, until Doug's wife,Elsa, threw it away thinking it was old yoghurt. This infuriated Doug as it was Chuck’s bread making legacy.

characters.name: Chuck
characters.description: ChuckBiographyGenderMaleFriendsDoug Gardner(Best friend)Evan Chapin(Co-worker)OccupationEMT (formerly)Chuckwas a minor character and a middle-aged adult inAtypical. He was the closest friend ofDoug Gardnerat the EMT workplace as a paramedic. Chuck is portrayed by actor Karl T. Wright. In thefirst Season, Chuck is first seen with Doug near their ambulance vehicle. Frequently, Chuck talks about his retirement plans to Doug coming up throughout each Seasons. In other words, Chuck is getting sick of working at EMT, since he is getting old. In thefinal Season, Doug gets a phone call in his house kitchen that Chuck had passed away from a heart attack. Chuck died on his retirement day. Shortly after passing Doug finds Chuck’s 13 year old sourdough starter in the work fridge and brings it home to keep in his fridge, until Doug's wife,Elsa, threw it away thinking it was old yoghurt. This infuriated Doug as it was Chuck’s bread making legacy.

characters.name: Coach Briggs
characters.description: Coach BriggsBiographyGenderMaleFriendsCasey Gardner(Gym student)Sharice(Gym student)Tanya (Gym student)Quinn (Gym student)Penelope (Gym student)Coach Briggsis a fictional character inAtypical. He is the gym teacher ofCasey Gardner, Sharice, Tanya, and their other friends at Newton High School. Coach Briggs is portrayed by actor Kevin Daniels. In the episode "A Human Female" of the first Season, Coach Briggs is shown coaching Casey and her friends to run on track with a strong determination to be skilled. In the episode "A Nice Neutral Smell", in Coach Briggs' office, after Casey punched bullyBailey Bennettin the face for messing withBeth Chapin, he breaks the news to Casey that since she is doing magnificent at track and she is besting other competitors, she earns her scholarship to get accepted into Clayton Prep. He feels proud of her accomplishment, and he highly encourages her to transfer to that school to which Casey agrees, even though she will miss him and her best friends at Newton High School. Although, he warns her to not assault someone again.

characters.name: Coach Briggs
characters.description: Coach BriggsBiographyGenderMaleFriendsCasey Gardner(Gym student)Sharice(Gym student)Tanya (Gym student)Quinn (Gym student)Penelope (Gym student)Coach Briggsis a fictional character inAtypical. characters.name: Coach Crowley
characters.description: Coach CrowleyBiographyGenderFemaleFriendsCasey Gardner(Former gym student)Izzie Taylor(Gym student)Coach Crowleyis a fictional character inSeason 2ofAtypical. She is the gym teacher ofCasey GardnerandIzzie Taylorat Clayton Prep. Coach Crowley is portrayed by actress Kimmy Gatewood. In the episode "Little Dude and the Lion" of the second Season, when Izzie falls and injures her wrist, she falsely accuses Casey of tripping her to cheat. Coach Crowley comes along to grant her students detention in her office. In Coach Crowley's office, she tells Casey and Izzie to not exit her office until they both make up with each other. After the Coach leaves and when Izzie reveals to Casey that she has three babies to take care, this allows Casey to open up about her older brother,Sam Gardner, being autistic and they both start to bond with each other. As Coach Crowley returns to her office, she is happy that two of her students finally stop fighting each other and they start getting along with each other. From the second Season to thethird Season, Coach Crowley motivates Casey to focus only on the track race, and if anything bothers her, then Casey should let her know about it. She even let Casey off the hook after she didn't win the track race, and Casey is given a chance to take a break from track for a while.

characters.name: Destiny
characters.description: DestinyDestiny appearing to the left ofSam.BiographyGenderFemaleDestinyis a guest character inSeason 1ofAtypical. She is a stripper at a strip club thatZahidattends sometimes. She is portrayed by actress Azur-De. In the "The D-Train to Bone Town" episode of Season 1,Samwaits outside of a strip club, while Zahid stays in. During this time, Sam encounters Destiny, who doesn't like the club very much, but she worked there. Sam informs her that he never has sex with ateenage girlbefore, and it will be his first time around. Kindly, she gives him advice, and she shows him her breasts and even vagina for preparation. She also tells him "good luck" as she heads inside of the strip club to do her arousing business there. Zahid comes out of the club, and he says "sup, Destiny", implying he knows her and confronts Sam asking "what'd I miss?!", after seeing a frozen, surprised look on Sam's face.

characters.name: Doug Gardner
characters.description: Doug GardnerBiographyFull NameDouglas GardnerBirthday1965StatusMarriedGenderMaleRelativesElsa Gardner(wife)Sam Gardner(son)Casey Gardner(daughter)Lillian(mother-in-law)RomancesElsa Gardner(wife)Megan(kissed)FriendsChuck(best friend) †Evan Chapin(co-worker)Theo(formerly)Holly(formerly)MeganOfficer TimmsOccupationEMTResidenceConnecticutSeries InformationSeasons1•2•3•4First Appearance1.01:"Antarctica"Last Appearance4.10:"Dessert at Olive Garden"Portrayed byMichael RapaportSamuel Douglas "Doug" Gardner IIIis one of the two tritagonists (alongsideElsa) of theNetflixcomedy drama seriesAtypical. He’s the father ofSamandCasey Gardnerand the husband ofElsa Gardner. Doug is portrayed by actorMichael Rapaport. Doug is fatherly, kind, gloomy, caring, honest, polite, considerate, gentle, decent, humble, generous, loving, compassionate, mild and gracious. In the 1980s, after graduating from high school, Doug had a relationship with a woman namedElsa Gardner, and he married her in 1995. Elsa gave birth to their kids (Sam Gardnerin 1999 andCasey Gardnerin 2002). Doug and Elsa are quite close with each other. They seem to have a completely normal family relationship with each other, and they both look like they are in love. When Sam asks about how they knew they were in love, Doug and Elsa both set the simple rules for deciding whether or not Sam was in love with his girlfriend,Paige Hardaway. Doug is fatherly, kind, gloomy, caring, honest, polite, considerate, gentle, decent, humble, generous, loving, compassionate, mild and gracious.
characters.personality_section: Doug is fatherly, kind, gloomy, caring, honest, polite, considerate, gentle, decent, humble, generous, loving, compassionate, mild and gracious.

characters.name: Duane Chapin
characters.description: DuaneBiographyGenderMaleRelativesUnnamed ex-wifeJosie(wife)Beth Chapin(daughter)Evan Chapin(son)RomancesJosie(Second Wife)Unnamed ex-wifeDuane Chapinis a fictional character inSeason 3ofAtypical. He is currently the husband ofJosieand the father ofEvan ChapinandBeth Chapin. In the episode "Y.G.A.G.G." of the Season 3, Duane is introduced by Beth toCasey Gardner. Duane also meets his son, Evan, whose father abandoned him during Evan's childhood, in a family reunion. Duane has dinner with his family members and with Casey. Unfortunately, it gets dramatic when Duane forcefully says that Evan should attend school, despite Evan being content with his job as a pizza employee. Casey stands up for Evan, saying Beth's father wasn't there for Evan when he needed him, and he doesn't have the right to dictate Evan's choices because Evan is a legal adult now. Duane is in disbelief as Casey runs off with Evan from the Chapin house to get away from Evan's father, as well as Casey strengthening her loving bond with her ex-boyfriend.

characters.name: Edison
characters.description: Edison being held bySam Gardner. Edisonis the pet tortoise ofSam Gardner. At the end ofSeason 4, his guardian,Zahid, will look after him, since Sam will be away with hisfatherat Antarctica for about a year.  In season 4, the characters of Atypical including Sam Gardener, himself, call Edison a turtle.

characters.name: Elsa Gardner
characters.description: Elsa GardnerBiographyAliasesEls(byDoug)Etta(bySasha Taylor)BirthdayFebruary 5, 1962StatusMarriedGenderFemaleRelativesSam Gardner(son)Casey Gardner(daughter)Doug Gardner(husband)Lillian(mother)Maddie(aunt)RomancesDoug Gardner(husband)Nick(ex-fling)FriendsLuisa(best friend)Theo(former)Holly(former)ResidenceConnecticutSeries InformationSeasons1•2•3•4First Appearance1.01:"Antarctica"Last Appearance4.10:"Dessert at Olive Garden"Portrayed byJennifer Jason LeighElsa Gardnerone of the two tritagonists (alongsideDoug) of theNetflixcomedy drama seriesAtypical. She is the mother ofSamandCasey Gardner. She attends a weekly support group on autism with other mothers. She is the wife of Doug Gardner and a hairdresser. Elsa is portrayed by actressJennifer Jason Leigh. Elsa is an action-oriented, fiercely protective yet often overbearing, doting mother with strong organizational and planning skills. She is always seamlessly managed the household while herhusband--although loving, responsible and hardworking--often took a backseat to parenting. However, as their two children become more and more independent, her husband begins connecting with them more often. As his confidence as a parent grows, her confidence subsides. Her sense of purpose deflates, which leads to changing roles and some big missteps along the way. characters.name: Evan Chapin
characters.description: Evan ChapinBiographyAliasesEvan Tuba(byCasey)Birthday1999GenderMaleRelativesBeth Chapin(younger sister)Duane Chapin(father)Josie(stepmother)Unnamed motherRomancesCasey Gardner(ex-girlfriend)FriendsSam GardnerDoug Gardner(co-worker)Chuck(co-worker) †Casey GardnerResidenceConnecticutSeries InformationSeasons1•2•3•4First Appearance1.01:"Antarctica"Last Appearance4.10:"Dessert at Olive Garden"Portrayed byGraham RogersEvan Chapinis a supporting character throughout thefirst,second,third, andfourthseasons of theNetflixcomedy drama seriesAtypical. Evan is portrayed by actorGraham Rogers. Evan is a former student at Newton High School who now attends a nearby technical school. He was harshly punished and expelled from Newton High School for stealing a tuba and other musical instruments from the band room and pawning them to random customers. Casey Gardneris Evan's ex-girlfriend. He starts to like her and he asks her to go out with him on a date at the beginning of this Season, after he finds out that she defended his younger sister,Beth, by punching bullyBailey Bennettin the face at school and getting suspended for it. Despite Casey initially rejecting him in favor of focusing on track, they quickly become friends and get together later on. In fact, he has sex with Casey in his house after she became very disoriented when she saw her mother,Elsa, giving a goodbye kiss toNickoutside of the bar.

characters.name: Evelyn
characters.description: EvelynBiographyGenderFemaleFriendsSam GardnerEvelynisSam's notetaker at Denton University inSeason 3ofAtypical. Evelyn is portrayed by actress Marietta Melrose. In the episode "Standing Sam" of Season 3, Evelyn is first seen at Denton University telling everyone to say an adjective that starts with the first letter of their name, and an action that goes with the adjective. She calls herself  "Excited Evelyn". From there on, Sam always refer to her as "Excited Evelyn", and she tells him her name is actually just "Evelyn". She even becomes Sam's notetaker at Denton University in his ethics class, whereProfessor Juddteaches Sam and the other students. InSeason 4, Evelyn makes a single appearance in the episode "Starters and Endings", in which Sam asks her for her assistance in getting information about traveling to Antarctica.

characters.name: Sam Gardner
characters.description: "People think autistic people don’t have empathy, but that’s not true. Sometimes I can’t tell if someone’s upset but, once I know, I feel lots of empathy… maybe even more than neurotypicals." - Sam Gardner, inThe Silencing Properties of Snow--Atypical Samuel GardnerBiographyFull NameSamuel GardnerAliasesSamSammySamantha(by Zahid)Standing Sam(by himself)BirthdaySeptember 30, 1999StatusSingleGenderMaleRelativesElsa Gardner(mother)Doug Gardner(father)Casey Gardner(younger sister)Lillian(maternal grandmother)Edison(pet tortoise)Stumpy(adopted penguin)RomancesPaige Hardaway(girlfriend)Bailey Bennett(ex-fling)Julia Sasaki(former crush)Bree(former interest)Riley(former interest)FriendsZahid(best friend)Paige HardawayChristopherJasperSidNoelleAmberLilySabrinaAbbyEvelynIzzie TaylorBailey BennettEvan ChapinBeth ChapinBobArlo(childhood; formerly)OccupationUniversity StudentResidenceConnecticutSeries InformationSeasons1•2•3•4First Appearance1.01:"Antarctica"Last Appearance4.10:"Dessert at Olive Garden"Portrayed byKeir GilchristSamuel Douglas "Sam" Gardner IVis the main protagonist of theNetflixcomedy drama seriesAtypical. He’s very interested in the South Pole, Antarctica and penguins. He’s the son ofDoug GardnerandElsa Gardnerand the older brother ofCasey Gardner. He was diagnosed with autism in 2004. Sam is portrayed by actorKeir Gilchrist. Sam is smart, eccentric, funny, cool, creative, empathetic and curious, even though he has a hard time expressing emotions and he often appears to be cold as chilly ice all of the time. He can also be awkward and blatantly honest, due to his autism. When he’s curious about something, he often goes into extensive research about it for a long period of time. He loves and cares about his family and friends and he wants to be very independent by himself. He loves and cares about his family and friends and he wants to be very independent by himself.

characters.name: Gretchen
characters.description: GretchenBiographyGenderFemaleRomancesZahid(Ex-fiancé)Gavin (Ex-boyfriend)Gretchenis a troublemaking girl, whomZahidfalls in love with inSeason 3ofAtypical. Gretchen is portrayed by actress Allie Rae Treharne. In the episode "Y.G.A.G.G." of the third Season, Gretchen is first introduced to Zahid when he andSamwent to an art jam party. Zahid meets Gretchen behind a dumpster, they both smoke cigarettes and start listening to Miley Cyrus. After this, they both start dating with each other. In the episode "Only Tweed", Zahid and Gretchen are both invited to the Gardner's house for a romantic couple dinner, alongsideIzzie TaylorandPaige Hardaway, by Sam andCasey Gardner. During their dinner, while Sam and Paige both talk about their good times at their own separate colleges, she says that attending college is a waste of time and money for students, and that learning from the internet is useful and free in the real-world, antagonizing Sam for going in the wrong path and ticking off him, Casey, and Paige. Sam and Paige both also begin to dislike her, and correct her about college being worth attending to pursue their dreams. The dinner ends with Gretchen leaving the Gardner's house.

characters.description: GretchenBiographyGenderFemaleRomancesZahid(Ex-fiancé)Gavin (Ex-boyfriend)Gretchenis a troublemaking girl, whomZahidfalls in love with inSeason 3ofAtypical. Zahid meets Gretchen behind a dumpster, they both smoke cigarettes and start listening to Miley Cyrus. After this, they both start dating with each other. In the episode "Only Tweed", Zahid and Gretchen are both invited to the Gardner's house for a romantic couple dinner, alongsideIzzie TaylorandPaige Hardaway, by Sam andCasey Gardner. During their dinner, while Sam and Paige both talk about their good times at their own separate colleges, she says that attending college is a waste of time and money for students, and that learning from the internet is useful and free in the real-world, antagonizing Sam for going in the wrong path and ticking off him, Casey, and Paige. Sam and Paige both also begin to dislike her, and correct her about college being worth attending to pursue their dreams. The dinner ends with Gretchen leaving the Gardner's house.

characters.name: Holly
characters.description: HollyBiographyGenderFemaleRelativesTheo(husband)Arlo(son)RomancesTheo(Husband)FriendsElsa Gardner(Formerly)Doug Gardner(Formerly)Hollyis a minor character inSeason 2ofAtypical. She’s the mother ofArlo, who’sSam Gardner's former childhood friend and current bully at Newton High School and she’s the  wife ofTheo. Holly is portrayed by actress Mina Baddie. In the episode "In the Dragon's Lair" of the second Season,Elsa GardnerandDoug Gardnerboth visit Holly and Theo (the parents of Arlo, who previously stole $700 from Sam while funding his house party and he smashed Sam's expensive phone) at Arlo's house. The four of them had been friends from over a decade earlier or back in the early 2000’s when Doug and Theo were both happy to see their wives being pregnant, and they believed that their unborn sons will get along like brothers. However, they stopped when Holly and Theo stopped inviting Sam to their camping trips because he was "difficult" to handle and Arlo tended to get into dramatic fights with Sam when they were little boys. Holly and Theo both apologized for their son's abusive attitude to Sam by returning the money, and buying a new phone to the Gardner parents. Holly apologizes for not inviting Sam to their camping trips. Holly and Elsa get along well for a brief moment, and Theo has a drink with Doug. Unfortunately, Theo and Doug both get into a heated argument with each other when Theo is dismissive of Sam because of his autism. In self-defense for Theo, Holly either enables or supports Theo to put down Doug; Elsa also stands up for her son with Doug against Theo's ableist behavior, and Doug and Elsa both return the money and a new phone to Holly and Theo. As a result, the companionship between Sam's parents and Arlo's parents has officially ended again for this time around.

characters.name: Honey
characters.description: HoneyBiographyGenderFemaleRomancesZahid (Dating partner)FriendsZahidHoneyis a guest character in thefourth SeasonofAtypical. She isZahid's most recent and current dating partner. Honey is portrayed by actress Jessica Paré. In the episode "Dessert at Olive Garden" of the final Season, in the upstairs' hallway between Zahid's apartment and Chip's apartment, Honey meets Zahid for the very first time. She moves in next door to his apartment after Zahid discovers that Chip moved out and he wants to borrow tools from her. He also attempts to flirt with her to attract her and have sex with her, but he hesitates on wooing her, finding her very beautiful and he nervously says that he tries to helpSamwhen she says she doesn't have any tools, except for a hammer. Because of Zahid's right testicle being surgically removed at a hospital to prevent the spread of cancer inside of his body, he states toCaseyand Sam that he is now a new man by being nice and respectful to Honey. She was also asked on a date with him later down the line. Casey explains to Zahid that this is how meaningful and romantic relationships last for a long time, similar to her relationship withIzzieand Sam's relationship withPaige.

characters.name: Izzie Taylor
characters.description: Izzie TaylorBiographyGenderFemaleRomancesNate(Ex-Boyfriend)Casey Gardner (Girlfriend)FriendsClayton Preparatory Track TeamCasey GardnerQuinnSam GardnerZahidPaige HardawayBeth Chapin Izzie Tayloris the supporting character introduced in theSeason 2ofAtypical. She is a member of the Clayton Preparatory Track Team and she is a "show no" to have many friends. She is introduced as an antagonist-turned friend-turned romantic interest toCasey Gardner. She was the girlfriend ofNate. Izzie Taylor is portrayed byFivel Stewart. At first, Izzie is disrespectful and cold towardsCasey. However, this changes in detention as they find common ground when getting drunk. They soon bond and tell each other that they're each other's new favorite person. She shows a more jealous and angry side when she’s aroundEvan, often scowling or rolling her eyes when he’s near Casey. Nevertheless, Izzie and Casey continue to navigate their new relationship.
